title: libtiff security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.4.0-15.2]
- fix CVE-2025-8176: tiffdither and tiffmedian skip first line of input
  images (RHEL-120239)

[4.4.0-15.1]
- fix CVE-2025-9900: buffer underflow crash in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented
  (RHEL-112545)
full_text:
[4.4.0-15.2]
- fix CVE-2025-8176: tiffdither and tiffmedian skip first line of input
  images (RHEL-120239)

[4.4.0-15.1]
- fix CVE-2025-9900: buffer underflow crash in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented
  (RHEL-112545)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20956.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-8176.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-9900.html
